creator: ard@100.pfr.ru
text:
The current version (0.9.14) that is in FreeBSD ports, have a bug that makes some Prewikka options/menu unaccessible under Python 2.6.

Under Python 2.6 аny attempt to modify user properties in Prewikka will result in error due to bug in string encoding.

Fix: 

Update to version 0.9.17
How-To-Repeat: Login to Prewikka, go to "Settings", "My Account".
Or go to "Settings", "User listing" and try to create user or modify existing one.
